concerns.text: FR-007 text is malformed: 'System MUST validate results across The analysis will focus on...' appears to be a concatenation error. The sentence structure is broken and needs editing to state a clear requirement.

Three edge cases are listed (FRED API incomplete data, non-stationary after differencing, insufficient sentiment volume) but no FR explicitly addresses how the system MUST handle these. Consider adding FRs or noting them as out-of-scope assumptions.

Both User Story 3 Acceptance Scenario 2 and SC-004 reference '[deferred] iterations' for bootstrap. While [deferred] is sanctioned, ensure consistency in terminology—both should use identical phrasing if they refer to the same metric.
